# v5.5 Canonical10 Stability Supplement

This companion report summarizes variability for the canonical 10-model set.

Method:
- Strategy: `profiled1`.
- For each `(competition, model, profile)`, use the earliest 5 successful runs (same rule as canonical table).
- Cell value format: `median (Q1..Q3)` on `score_raw`.
